judge_questions: Did the agent verify which appointment to cancel before cancelling?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Fortis Memorial Research Institute, Gurgaon. This is Diya. How may I help you today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, I’m calling to cancel an appointment I have scheduled. I'm feeling much better now, so I don't need to come in anymore.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I'm glad to hear you're feeling better. I can certainly help you with that. Could you please provide the ten-digit mobile number associated with your appointment?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I see an appointment for Farah Khan with Dr. Satish Koul on Friday, July seventeenth at nine thirty in the morning. Is this the appointment you would like to cancel?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, that's the one. Please go ahead and cancel it for me.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: That appointment has been successfully cancelled. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thank you so much for your help. Have a good day!

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: You're very welcome. I'm glad I could help. Have a wonderful day, and take care!
